name_ru: Её настоящий 8 марта — честно и неловко
name_en: Her Actual March 8 — Honest, Slightly Awkward

labels: ["кто это решил меня удивить?", "улыбка... но вы не видели меня", "а как же... сердечно не могу", "где всё это разместить?", "ах, спасибо... не знаю, как реагировать", "забавно, что все вдруг заметили меня", "стоп! я не могу всё это переварить", "неловко, но приятно. как-то странно", "коробочка... сердце стучит", "комната полна цветов... покажу, наверное", "да, мне приятно это слышать", "вот это да... усталость с комплиментами", "хватит... голова не может больше", "время отдохнуть... счастье через край", "честно, сейчас не знаю, как это оценить", "смс... цветы... просто не говорите никому"]
labels_en: ["who decided to surprise me?", "smile... but you haven't seen me", "oh well... heart's not in it", "where to put all this?", "thanks... don't know how to react", "funny how everyone suddenly noticed me", "stop! can't process all this", "awkward, but nice. kinda weird", "a little box... heart's racing", "room full of flowers... scene_descriptions: ["{subject} waist-up, striped pajamas with a robe being shrugged on, clutching bright tulips, bewildered.", "{subject} chest-up, forced half-smile, teeth bared tight, shoulders tense, eyes calculating, obviously skeptical.", "{subject} chest-up, pale, clutching an ornate gold-rimmed coffee cup, gaze distant, painfully withdrawn.", "{subject} waist-up, pajamas now under a bulky cardigan, balancing a second bouquet, frantic, overwhelmed.", "{subject} chest-up, blushing exaggeratedly, eyes downcast but amused, hand at throat, faux-shy expression.", "{subject} waist-up, swapped cardigan for a sharp blazer, hands on hips, radiant, triumphant amusement.", "{subject} chest-up, glittery phone held to ear, eyes wide, head fizzling, overwhelmed by endless notifications.", "{subject} chest-up, brow stiff, smile frozen, hearing a familiar compliment, terribly awkward, tense.", "{subject} chest-up, fingers tapping a tiny gift box, eyes glossy, heart melting while tallying quietly.", "{subject} waist-up, blazer peeled off for a soft sweater, gripping a phone, screen glowing 'show bouquet', breathless.", "{subject} chest-up, shoulders easing, small satisfied smile, visibly basking in sudden attention, quietly pleased.", "{subject} chest-up, eyes glossy, mouth trembling from exhaustion and too many compliments, absurdly overwhelmed.", "{subject} waist-up, adding a chunky scarf, palms raised, jaw set, expression firm, smile aching from too much.", "{subject} chest-up, eyes closed, soft smile, shoulders slackening, a quieter, slightly happier solitude.", "{subject} chest-up, a crooked grin, eyebrow arched, savoring the moment, sheepishly delighted beyond expected value.", "{subject} waist-up, trading sweater for a flowing silk robe, hand to mouth, eyes gleaming, secretive delight."]
